scene.description: A muddy trailhead at the edge of town, rain still soft in the air.

stages.situation: The road out of town is thin and wet. Somewhere past the treeline the rain is heavier. You could go now, or wait it out.

choices.text: Go now, while the rain is only a whisper.
choices.outcome: You walk into it. The rain finds the back of your collar within the hour, but the road is already behind you.

choices.text: Wait under the eaves for it to ease.
choices.outcome: You wait longer than you meant to. By the time you leave, the sky has thinned to a pale grey and the road is quieter for it.

choices.text: Cut through the wet field to save the hour.
choices.outcome: The field is slower than it looks, and colder. You come out the other side with mud to the knee and a chill you can't quite shake.

scene.description: A fork in the road beside a stone well, blossom just starting on the trees.

stages.situation: A woman is resting against the well, pack half-open beside her. She looks up as you near and says nothing, waiting to see if you'll stop.

choices.text: Ask if she wants company on the road.
choices.outcome: She looks at you for a long moment, then nods once and shoulders her pack. "Mira," she says, like that settles it.

choices.text: Share what food you can spare, then walk on alone.
choices.memory: A stranger's quiet thanks at a well you never learned the name of.
choices.outcome: She eats slowly, watching the road rather than you. When you leave she raises a hand, and you carry that small weight with you.
She doesn't call after you. The well disappears behind a bend, and the road narrows again.

scene.description: A shallow stream crossing under new leaves, sunlight breaking through in patches.

stages.situation: The stream is cold and only knee-deep. On the far bank, something pale catches the light among the stones.

choices.text: Sit on the bank a while before crossing.
choices.outcome: The water talks to itself over the stones. You feel some of the last few days loosen in your shoulders.

choices.text: Wade over and see what's catching the light.
choices.memory: A smooth river stone, pale as bone, pocketed without knowing why.
choices.outcome: It's only a stone, smoothed pale by years of current. You take it anyway.

choices.text: Cross quickly and keep the pace.
choices.outcome: You're across before the cold really reaches you, and the road climbs away from the water on the other side.
